endpoints.name: Fetches the AAD properties from target region BCM stamp.
endpoints.description: Fetches the AAD properties from target region BCM stamp.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: Restores the specified backed up data in a different region as compared to where the data is backed up.
endpoints.description: Restores the specified backed up data in a different region as compared to where the data is backed up.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: Get CRR job details from target region.
endpoints.description: Get CRR job details from target region.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: Gets the list of CRR jobs from the target region.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/locations/{azureRegion}/backupCrrOperationResults/{operationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/locations/{azureRegion}/backupCrrOperationsStatus/{operationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{AZUREREGION}} with a real azureregion.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/protectedItems/{protectedItemName}/recoveryPoints/
endpoints.description: Lists the backup copies for the backed up item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: Returns the Access token for communication between BMS and Protection service
endpoints.description: Returns the Access token for communication between BMS and Protection service
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{RECOVERYPOINTID}} with a real recoverypointid. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupProtectedItems/
endpoints.description: Provides a pageable list of all items that are backed up within a vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.
